mapper.sql: id, supplier_id, order_no, product_summary, customer_name, customer_address, installer_name, installer_mobile, appointment_date, appointment_time, status, photos, remark, completed_at, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO supplier_installations (supplier_id, order_no, product_summary, customer_name, customer_address, installer_name, installer_mobile, appointment_date, appointment_time, status, photos, remark, completed_at, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{supplierId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{orderNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{productSummary, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{customerName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{customerAddress, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{installerName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{installerMobile, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{appointmentDate, jdbcType=DATE}, #{appointmentTime, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{photos, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{completedAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createdAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updatedAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})

INSERT INTO supplier_installations (supplier_id, order_no, product_summary, customer_name, customer_address, installer_name, installer_mobile, appointment_date, appointment_time, status, photos, remark, completed_at, created_at, updated_at) VALUES
(#{item.supplierId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.orderNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.productSummary, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.customerName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.customerAddress, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.installerName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.installerMobile, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.appointmentDate, jdbcType=DATE}, #{item.appointmentTime, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.photos, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.completedAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.createdAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.updatedAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})
mapper.select: SELECT FROM supplier_installations WHERE id = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT} AND status != 'deleted'
SELECT FROM supplier_installations WHERE id IN #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT} AND status != 'deleted'
mapper.update: UPDATE supplier_installations SET status = 'deleted' WHERE id = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}
UPDATE supplier_installations SET status = 'deleted' WHERE id IN #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM supplier_installations WHERE order_no = #{orderNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND status != 'deleted' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1
